stories.title: Co Be Lo Lem
stories.content: Ngay xua co mot co be cham chi va tot bung. Du gap kho khan, em van giu long nhan hau va cuoi cung duoc moi nguoi yeu quy.
stories.moral: Long tot bung luon duoc den dap

stories.title: Cay Tre Tram Dot
stories.content: Mot chang trai hien lanh luon lam viec cham chi. Nho that tha va kien tri, chang vuot qua thu thach va tim duoc hanh phuc.
stories.moral: That tha va kien tri se chien thang

stories.title: Tam Cam
stories.content: Tam hien hau, cham chi va biet yeu thuong. Sau nhieu thu thach, dieu tot dep da den voi Tam.
stories.moral: Song hien lanh va dung cam

stories.title: Su Tich Qua Dua Hau
stories.content: Mai An Tiem song tu lap tren dao vang. Bang cong suc va tri thong minh, gia dinh tim ra qua dua hau mat lanh.
stories.moral: Tu lap va lao dong tao nen thanh qua

stories.title: Thanh Giong
stories.content: Cau be Giong lon nhanh de bao ve lang xom. Sau chien thang, Giong bay ve troi trong long biet on cua moi nguoi.
stories.moral: Dung cam de bao ve dieu tot
